rationale: The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption is unrelated to Gov't Code §2306.0502, which governs collection of penalties by the attorney general. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: Sec. 2306.0502. COLLECTION OF PENALTY. (a) If the person does not pay the penalty and the enforcement of the penalty is not stayed, the penalty may be collected.
_note: Rule text concerns penalty collection enforcement; no nexus to homestead exemption amounts.
